response.justification: Wei Chen is a Staff-level engineer with exceptional technical depth, but applying to a Junior/Mid-Level role presents a severe seniority mismatch. While they exceed all core technical requirements (TypeScript, React, REST APIs, clean architecture focus), they lack specific experience with PostgreSQL (job preference) and Nest.js (listed requirement). More critically, hiring someone at this level for an entry-to-mid position carries high flight risk—they will quickly exhaust the role's growth trajectory and likely depart. This is a candidate for a Senior or Staff position, not a junior track.
strengths: Exceptional TypeScript and React expertise with decade+ production experience across multiple companies
Strong software craftsmanship mindset—explicitly practiced TDD, CI/CD, pair programming, and architectural discipline
Full-stack + infrastructure capability: Node.js backends, Kubernetes, AWS, and AI-agent infrastructure experience
concerns: Severely overqualified: Staff-level engineer applying to Junior/Mid-Level role suggests misalignment or underlying flight risk
Missing required tech stack specifics: No PostgreSQL experience mentioned (only MongoDB), and no Nest.js despite it being listed
Overqualification creates retention risk: Role will not provide sufficient growth or challenge to retain someone at this caliber
